review: I have not tasted mass so freshly ground in the green chile tamale since my travels in Mexico almost fifty years ago.  The aromatic sweetness and texture of the main hits on all cylinders.  The rice is the traditional mid grain of high quality that is neither salty nor greasy.  It is the neutral compliment to the rest of the meal offerings.  The home made corn tortillas are thick and freshly made.  There is a distinct nuttiness to masa that has not been refrigerated.  This is the real thing just in time. When reheated from room temperature the masa blooms once again and creates a combustible delicacy with whatever meat or sauces fills the tortilla.  Because the ingredients are such great quality and not processed each bite is a treasure trove of satisfying culinary pleasure.  I suggest everyone ordering different items with extra tortillas and sharing a thick slice of flan.  I just had a can of Coke after remembering a half a century's old  Mexican advertising jingle . Coca Cola es la Chispa de la Vida'  You will feel the sparkle the minute you see the colorful exterior and not want to quickly return to the otherwise bland street outside.  Pico De Gallo is the Sparkle of Life!
